name: Loughborough University Stadium
metaTitle: Loughborough University Track (Paula Radcliffe Stadium) Information
metaDescription: Check the latest wind speed and stadium information for the Paula Radcliffe Stadium at Loughborough University.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Access is primarily for clubs, schools, and university performance squads. Casual public use is limited and subject to scheduled 'pay and play' sessions.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access typically requires a Loughborough Sport membership or affiliation with a local club like Charnwood AC.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Paid visitor parking is available on the Loughborough University campus (Epinal Way entrance).

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Paula Radcliffe Stadium, Loughborough University, Epinal Way, Loughborough, LE11 3TU

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Loughborough Sport page for facility details and booking enquiries.
